item_name: Catch a fish with a net
prompt:
A hand carefully guides an aquarium net through the water of a planted tank, gently herding a small fish toward the net’s opening. The fish is just entering the soft nylon mesh, and other tank inhabitants and plants sway undisturbed in the background, emphasizing a calm, controlled movement rather than frantic chasing. A bucket or smaller holding tank sits beside the main aquarium, ready to receive the fish once it is safely in the net.

The environment is a near-future solarpunk home aquarium setup with soft, even lighting, additional tanks or plants in the blurred background, and neatly organized maintenance tools nearby. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or readable text on the net or equipment, and a composition that centers the net, fish, and guiding hand while the rest of the tank and room remain softly out of focus, emphasizing safe, low-stress fish transfers during cleaning.
